title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float family as a Senior Software Engineer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float:
Capital Float is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float!
